# Safe Wording for Proof Claims

| Strong wording | Use only when | Safer default |
|---|---|---|
| “This proves manipulation occurred.” | Regulator finding, admission, contract, payment trail, or direct platform action. | “This pattern is consistent with coordinated amplification.” |
| “This campaign caused virality.” | You have counterfactual exposure data or clear causal experiment. | “This campaign plausibly contributed to early visibility and perceived momentum.” |
| “The algorithm was tricked.” | Platform confirms ranking manipulation or you have internal data. | “The tactic targets signals that recommender systems commonly use.” |
| “The accounts are fake.” | Platform action or forensic identity evidence. | “The accounts display suspiciously coordinated behaviour.” |
| “This is fraud.” | Legal finding, guilty plea, regulator penalty, or clear statutory basis. | “This raises deception/manipulation concerns.” |
